items.name_en: 💖《With full original green box packaging》💖 GG Marmont Series Leather Tri-Fold Wallet, Gucci continues to update colors, adding more refined tones. In new colorways and combinations, the brand reinterprets the classic GG Marmont series with a modern perspective. This tri-fold wallet is crafted from Forest Green leather, with brand identity accessories presented in palladium tone. Forest Green leather, palladium-tone hardware, double-G, eight card slots, two bill slots.
